summary: This rate is well below NYCHA's 95% target but has grown roughly eightfold since FY22 as NYCHA ramped up mold remediation under the Baez v. NYCHA consent decree and its 2019 federal HUD Agreement. NYCHA credits a data dashboard (its Mold and Leak Scorecard, plus a new daily operations dashboard added in January 2025) for helping identify and prioritize backlogged mold cases Authority-wide.

sources.label: NYCHA, Fiscal 2025 and Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Reports
NRDC, "Baez v. New York City Housing Authority"
